prestazioni: RB25DE (NEO) or RB25DET (turbocharged) engine swap with a Garrett GT3076R turbocharger (0.86 A/R, 60mm compressor inducer) paired with a Tomei 260° camshaft kit (intake/exhaust) and HKS 272° adjustable cam gears for optimized valve timing under forced induction

Custom 3-inch stainless steel turbo-back exhaust system by Fujitsubo (model 025-001) with a 50mm wastegate dump tube and a GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller for precise RB25DET turbo management (targeting 1.2 bar / 17.5 psi peak boost)

Nismo 555cc fuel injectors (PN: 16600-21U00) with a Walbro 255 lph in-tank fuel pump, AEM 320lph external lift pump, and a Sard 1,000cc top-feed fuel rail kit for RB25DET applications, controlled via a Haltech Elite 2500 ECU with flex-fuel capability and individual cylinder trims
estetica: Vertex Japan 'Racing' front bumper lip (C33-specific, PN: VX-RC33F) with integrated tow hooks and a custom carbon fiber splitter by Seibon (model CF-C33-01), reinforced with a Cusco front strut bar (PN: 666 540 A)

Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (C33 Laurel-specific, PN: PB-C33-03) with overfenders extended 50mm per side, paired with Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels (18x9.5 +15 ET, 5x114.3) wrapped in Toyo R888R 245/40R18 tires for staggered fitment

JUN Auto rear diffuser (C33-specific, PN: JUN-033-002) with integrated dual 3-inch exhaust outlets and a custom carbon fiber trunk spoiler by Veilside (model VS-C33-01), painted in Nissan 'Dark Gun Grey' (KH3) with a matte clear coat
